_comment: data/triodion/triodion-lenten-weekday.json — Horologion v5.0
PURPOSE: Triodion text dataset for Great Lent weekday troparion resolution
in the Little Hours, Small Compline, and Vespers.
SCOPE (v5.0): Weeks 1–6 of Great Lent weekdays (Mon–Fri).
Holy Week (Palm Sunday through Great Saturday) is NOT included here.
The engine computes Lent week number from daysSinceCleanMonday / 7 + 1.
Weeks 1–6 cover Clean Monday through the Friday before Palm Sunday.
KEY STRUCTURE:
Outer key: lent_week integer string (1–6).
Week 1 begins on Clean Monday (Pascha - 48 days).
Week 6 ends on the Friday before Palm Sunday (Pascha - 15 days).
Inner key: weekday name string (monday | tuesday | wednesday |
thursday | friday).
TROPARION SHAPE:
text  — full troparion text as used in the Little Hours and Compline
label — display label for this troparion slot
tone  — integer 1–8; the tone of the troparion
source — canonical source name for attribution
LITURGICAL NOTE ON FIXED TEXT:
In standard Byzantine practice (Antiochian/OCA, Jordanville/Hapgood tradition),
the dismissal troparion appointed at the Little Hours (First, Third, Sixth,
Ninth Hour) and Small Compline throughout Great Lent weekdays is a fixed
penitential text. It does not vary by week. The same troparion is used on
all Lenten weekdays from Clean Monday through the Friday of the Sixth Week.
Week-specific Triodion material (kanons, stichera, sedalions) governs
Matins/Orthros, not the Little Hours.
Source: Jordanville Horologion (2008); Hapgood Service Book tradition.
FIXED FEAST INTERACTION:
On days where a qualifying Menaion feast occurs (e.g. Annunciation, St. Joseph),
the engine's existing feast-arbitration layer wins and this Triodion text
does not fire. No special handling is needed in this file.
WEEK NUMBERING REFERENCE (2026):
Week 1: Feb 23 (Clean Mon) – Feb 27
Week 2: Mar 02 – Mar 06
Week 3: Mar 09 – Mar 13
Week 4: Mar 16 – Mar 20  (St. Joseph Mar 19 = feast override, Triodion suppressed)
Week 5: Mar 23 – Mar 27  (Annunciation Mar 25 = feast override, Triodion suppressed)
Week 6: Mar 30 – Apr 03  (Holy Week begins Apr 06; Wk 6 ends Apr 03)

_meta.coverage: Weeks 1–6 (Clean Monday through Friday of the Sixth Week of Great Lent)
_meta.note: Full Great Lent weekday corpus. Holy Week not included. Fixed penitential troparion used throughout per Jordanville/Hapgood tradition.

troparion.text: Have mercy on us, O Lord, have mercy on us; for at a loss for any defence, this prayer do we sinners offer unto Thee as Master: have mercy on us.
troparion.label: Lenten Troparion — Clean Monday, First Week of Great Lent
troparion.source: Triodion — First Week of Great Lent
